dict.string: Optimize selected input with configured defaults
Invert default optimization for selected input
Invert output behavior for selected input
Invert optimization and output behavior for selected input
Image, video, PDF and clipboard optimiser

request="${1:-}" route="$(./alfred-clop route --public-request "$request")" if [[ "$route" == "execute" ]]; then feedback="$(./alfred-clop request --public-request "$request" --quiet)" if [[ -n "$feedback" ]]; then escaped="${feedback//\\/\\\\}" escaped="${escaped//\"/\\\"}" escaped="${escaped//$'\n'/\\n}" printf '{"alfredworkflow":{"variables":{"alfred_clop_notification":"%s"}}}' "$escaped" fi elif [[ "$route" == "menu" ]]; then ./alfred-clop handoff --public-request "$request" fi

if [[ -n "${alfred_clop_request:-}" ]]; then ./alfred-clop request --public-request "$alfred_clop_request" --input-context "arguments" --query "${1:-}" elif [[ -n "${alfred_clop_menu_state:-}" ]]; then ./alfred-clop menu --menu-state "$alfred_clop_menu_state" --input-json "${alfred_clop_input_json:-}" --input-context "${alfred_clop_input_context:-selected}" --query "${1:-}" elif [[ -n "${alfred_clop_input_json:-}" ]]; then ./alfred-clop menu --input-json "$alfred_clop_input_json" --input-context "${alfred_clop_input_context:-selected}" --query "${1:-}" elif [[ "${alfred_clop_explicit_clipboard:-}" == "true" ]]; then ./alfred-clop menu --input-source clipboard --query "${1:-}" elif [[ -n "${alfred_clop_explicit_input:-}" ]]; then ./alfred-clop menu --explicit-input "$alfred_clop_explicit_input" --input-context "${alfred_clop_input_context:-selected}" --query "${1:-}" else ./alfred-clop menu --input-source keywordClipboard --query "${1:-}" fi
Choose an action for copied files
tell application id "com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred" to reveal workflow (system attribute "alfred_workflow_bundleid") with configuration

return_query="$(./alfred-clop configure --menu-state "${1:-}" --return-query)" feedback="$(./alfred-clop configure --menu-state "${1:-}")" arg="${return_query:-:}" escaped_arg="${arg//\\/\\\\}" escaped_arg="${escaped_arg//\"/\\\"}" escaped_arg="${escaped_arg//$'\n'/\\n}" escaped_feedback="${feedback//\\/\\\\}" escaped_feedback="${escaped_feedback//\"/\\\"}" escaped_feedback="${escaped_feedback//$'\n'/\\n}" printf '{"alfredworkflow":{"arg":"%s","variables":{"alfred_clop_notification":"%s"}}}' "$escaped_arg" "$escaped_feedback"

if [[ "${alfred_clop_request_kind:-}" == "openUpdateRelease" ]]; then /usr/bin/open "${1:-}" exit elif [[ "${alfred_clop_request_kind:-}" == "revealSettingsFolder" ]]; then /bin/mkdir -p -- "${1:-}" /usr/bin/open "${1:-}" exit elif [[ "${alfred_clop_request_kind:-}" == "updateCheck" ]]; then feedback="$(./alfred-clop update-check)" elif [[ "${alfred_clop_request_kind:-}" == "configurationMutation" ]]; then feedback="$(./alfred-clop configure --menu-state "${1:-}")" elif [[ "${alfred_clop_request_kind:-}" == "diagnosticReportCopy" ]]; then report="$(./alfred-clop diagnostics-report)" printf '%s' "$report" | /usr/bin/pbcopy feedback="Copied diagnostic report" elif [[ "${alfred_clop_request_kind:-}" == "pipelinePromptCopy" ]]; then prompt="$(./alfred-clop pipeline-prompt --task "${1:-}")" if [[ "$prompt" == Unable\ to\ generate\ AI\ pipeline\ prompt:* ]]; then feedback="$prompt" else printf '%s' "$prompt" | /usr/bin/pbcopy feedback="Copied AI pipeline prompt" fi else feedback="$(./alfred-clop execute --request-json "${1:-}" --quiet)" fi if [[ -n "$feedback" ]]; then escaped="${feedback//\\/\\\\}" escaped="${escaped//\"/\\\"}" escaped="${escaped//$'\n'/\\n}" printf '{"alfredworkflow":{"variables":{"alfred_clop_notification":"%s"}}}' "$escaped" fi

feedback="$(./alfred-clop automate --input-source clipboard --standard)" if [[ -n "$feedback" ]]; then escaped="${feedback//\\/\\\\}" escaped="${escaped//\"/\\\"}" escaped="${escaped//$'\n'/\\n}" printf '{"alfredworkflow":{"variables":{"alfred_clop_notification":"%s"}}}' "$escaped" fi

feedback="$(./alfred-clop automate --input-source explicit --input-value "${1:-}")" if [[ -n "$feedback" ]]; then escaped="${feedback//\\/\\\\}" escaped="${escaped//\"/\\\"}" escaped="${escaped//$'\n'/\\n}" printf '{"alfredworkflow":{"variables":{"alfred_clop_notification":"%s"}}}' "$escaped" fi

feedback="$(./alfred-clop automate --input-source explicit --input-value "${1:-}" --invert-aggressive)" if [[ -n "$feedback" ]]; then escaped="${feedback//\\/\\\\}" escaped="${escaped//\"/\\\"}" escaped="${escaped//$'\n'/\\n}" printf '{"alfredworkflow":{"variables":{"alfred_clop_notification":"%s"}}}' "$escaped" fi

feedback="$(./alfred-clop automate --input-source clipboard --aggressive)" if [[ -n "$feedback" ]]; then escaped="${feedback//\\/\\\\}" escaped="${escaped//\"/\\\"}" escaped="${escaped//$'\n'/\\n}" printf '{"alfredworkflow":{"variables":{"alfred_clop_notification":"%s"}}}' "$escaped" fi

feedback="$(./alfred-clop automate --input-source explicit --input-value "${1:-}" --standard)" if [[ -n "$feedback" ]]; then escaped="${feedback//\\/\\\\}" escaped="${escaped//\"/\\\"}" escaped="${escaped//$'\n'/\\n}" printf '{"alfredworkflow":{"variables":{"alfred_clop_notification":"%s"}}}' "$escaped" fi

feedback="$(./alfred-clop automate --input-source explicit --input-value "${1:-}" --invert-preserve)" if [[ -n "$feedback" ]]; then escaped="${feedback//\\/\\\\}" escaped="${escaped//\"/\\\"}" escaped="${escaped//$'\n'/\\n}" printf '{"alfredworkflow":{"variables":{"alfred_clop_notification":"%s"}}}' "$escaped" fi

feedback="$(./alfred-clop automate --input-source explicit --input-value "${1:-}" --aggressive)" if [[ -n "$feedback" ]]; then escaped="${feedback//\\/\\\\}" escaped="${escaped//\"/\\\"}" escaped="${escaped//$'\n'/\\n}" printf '{"alfredworkflow":{"variables":{"alfred_clop_notification":"%s"}}}' "$escaped" fi

feedback="$(./alfred-clop automate --input-source explicit --input-value "${1:-}" --invert-aggressive --invert-preserve)" if [[ -n "$feedback" ]]; then escaped="${feedback//\\/\\\\}" escaped="${escaped//\"/\\\"}" escaped="${escaped//$'\n'/\\n}" printf '{"alfredworkflow":{"variables":{"alfred_clop_notification":"%s"}}}' "$escaped" fi

# CLOP FOR ALFRED
[![](assets/readme/clop.png)](https://lowtechguys.com/clop/)
[Visit Clop's website](https://lowtechguys.com/clop/) | [Clop for Alfred on GitHub](https://github.com/ognistik/alfred-clop) | [External Trigger Guide](https://github.com/ognistik/alfred-clop/blob/main/docs/external-trigger.md) | [Buy Me a Coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/afadingthought)
[Clop](https://lowtechguys.com/clop/) is a powerful, flexible macOS app that makes images, videos, PDFs, and clipboard media smaller and easier to share. It can optimize files with minimal visible quality loss, resize and crop media, convert formats, and automate those operations through its command-line tool.
Clop for Alfred puts those capabilities into a quick, searchable menu. It shows only the actions that fit your selected, copied, or passed files and URLs—without asking you to remember command-line options.
*This is an independent, unofficial workflow and is not affiliated with Clop's developer.*
---
## REQUIREMENTS
* macOS * Alfred with the Powerpack * [Clop](https://lowtechguys.com/clop/) installed
The workflow finds Clop’s bundled command-line tool automatically. No shell setup is required.
---
## GET STARTED
**From a selection**
Select files in Finder or Alfred, open Universal Actions, and choose `Clop Menu`.
**From the clipboard**
Copy a file, folder, path, URL, or image, then type the workflow keyword. The default is `cl`.
**From a Hotkey**
Assign the included Hotkeys in Alfred to open the menu or optimize immediately from Finder, a selection, or the clipboard.
![The Clop for Alfred action menu](assets/readme/main-menu-dark.png)
---
## NAVIGATE THE MENUS
* Type to search actions, formats, sizes, presets, or pipelines. * Press Return to run an action or enter its parameter menu. * Follow the subtitle for available modifiers such as Command-Return, Shift-Return, or Command-L. * Type values directly where offered: `16:9`, `1200x630`, `w128`, or `50%`. * Delete the current query to return to the broader menu.
The available actions change with your input. Image-only actions, for example, stay hidden when you pass only audio files.
![Typing a crop ratio directly](assets/readme/crop-menu-dark.png)
---
## CONFIGURE CLOP FOR ALFRED
Type `:` in the action menu to open the in-workflow Configuration menu. Delete the `:` to return to your actions without losing the current input.
![The Clop for Alfred Configuration menu](assets/readme/configuration-menu-dark.png)
From there you can edit the output template, open Workflow Settings, manage presets and pipelines, check for updates, and copy a Diagnostics report.
The configuration panel you are viewing controls the keyword, clipboard behavior, output preservation, default optimization, Clop’s floating result, notifications, copying, folder recursion, and clipboard-image retention.
Set any Hotkeys you want directly on the workflow canvas. The workflow works immediately with Universal Actions and the keyword; Hotkeys are optional.
---
## AUTOMATION & HELP
The public External Trigger can open menus or execute actions from scripts, Shortcuts, Keyboard Maestro, and other Alfred workflows. See the [External Trigger Guide](https://github.com/ognistik/alfred-clop/blob/main/docs/external-trigger.md) for syntax and examples.
For full documentation, troubleshooting, updates, and issue reporting, [visit Clop for Alfred on GitHub](https://github.com/ognistik/alfred-clop). To report a problem, type `:` and choose `Diagnostics` to copy a privacy-conscious support report.
Use settings.json from this folder. Changing it switches configurations. Settings keep track of your output template & custom presets.
This setting only relates to the Workflow's keyword. Explicit clipboard Hotkeys and External Trigger requests remain available.
Recover the newest valid clipboard input
When an Alfred menu has no supported current clipboard input, search local Alfred Clipboard History. Never applies to headless execution.
Shift-Return inverts this for one run.
Command-Return inverts this for one run.
Independent from clipboard copying and notifications.
Successful processing stays quiet when Clop's result UI is shown.
Check weekly and show update hints
Checks while the workflow is used. New releases appear at the top of the menu and notify once.
Controls both menu inspection and Clop execution.
Applies only to workflow-owned raw clipboard images.
